title: Driven Earnings Beat and Raised Forecast – NaturalNews.com
description: Dell Technologies rose 38% in New York premarket trading on May 29, 2026, after the company reported quarterly results that exceeded analyst expectations and issued a sharply higher annual forecast, according to a company statement. The surge reflected strong demand for artificial intelligence servers, which continued to reshape the hardware sector and reinforced Dell’s position […]
